'''Cyl Sant''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[New Bornalex/Legends|New Bornalex]]. She was married to a [[Theelin/Legends|Theelin]] with whom she had a daughter, [[Rystáll Sant/Legends|Rystáll]].

==Biography==
Shortly after Rystáll's birth, Cyl moved to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to start a new life. But things didn't go as planned. Not having any [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] left, she couldn't afford to raise a child and had to abandon her baby daughter. Desperate, she put Rystáll into the [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] of an [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] couple that was parked in the streets of [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]]. She also left a note in which she asked them to take care of her child.
